Test Site Navigation menu home

Visual Assist E2E Fixture

Typography Section

This paragraph has no inline font-size set. Its computed size should be scaled by the fontScale factor from the element's computed style, not from a hard-coded default.

This paragraph has an inline font-size of 20px. After fontScale 1.5 is applied, it should render at approximately 30px.

Layout and Spacing

Letter spacing and line-height should apply to div children too, not just the body element. This text is inside a div to exercise that selector coverage.

This span should also pick up letter-spacing and line-height overrides when those settings are active.

Icon Fonts

Icon font test elements:

 star X This span has no icon class and should receive the dyslexia font when enabled.

Form Elements

Paragraphs for Chunked Scaling

Paragraph 1: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

Paragraph 2: Accessibility is about removing barriers for all users.

Paragraph 3: Font scaling should not break page layout or fixed elements.

Paragraph 4: Each paragraph here exercises the chunked DOM traversal.

Paragraph 5: The reading guide should track both mouse and keyboard focus.

Paragraph 6: Contrast presets must preserve background-image on sprite icons.

Paragraph 7: Dyslexia font overrides must exempt Material Icons and FontAwesome.

Paragraph 8: Focus indicators use :focus-visible, not bare :focus.

Paragraph 9: Letter spacing and line height now apply to div and span too.

Paragraph 10: Disabling visual assist must fully restore all computed styles.

Jump to top (focusable link for keyboard guide test)

Footer content — structural element for contrast background testing.
